acip_transport(3) Library Functions Manual acip_transport(3)

NAME

acip_transport - Transport instance structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/acip/transport.h>

Data Fields


const acip_transport_methods_t * methods
Method table (virtual functions). crypto_context_t * crypto_ctx
Optional encryption context. void * impl_data
Transport-specific state.

Detailed Description

Transport instance structure.

Base structure for all transport implementations. Specific transports extend this with their own state.

Definition at line 203 of file transport.h.

Field Documentation

crypto_context_t* acip_transport::crypto_ctx

Optional encryption context.
